name: Seed 63 files, then run the cursor-loop campaign: each iteration crawls one bounded chunk (batch_size 10 × max_batches 2 = 20 files) resuming from the previous cursor, publishing every batch durably to the INVENTORY_FOLD stream (sink mode — no engine channel tokens); mekhan's fold consumer upserts file_inventory idempotently. The loop runs until a chunk comes back EMPTY (exit skips the accumulator merge, so the empty chunk loses nothing): 20+20+20+3+0 → 5 body runs, final parked iteration counter 4, total 63.
